rationale: The pair is thematically and conceptually central rather than incidental: the citing paper models and measures customer acquisition and retention spending, while the cited paper is explicitly a methodology for linking acquisition to retention. The cited note’s core contribution (joint acquisition–retention modeling under selection/censoring) plausibly serves as a foundational method/theory source for the citing paper’s stated extension of prior acquisition–retention work, so this should be reviewed in second-stage judgment.
